title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.120 - Central mail handling unit
text:
37.120.  Central mail handling unit. — The commissioner of administration shall establish a central mail handling unit.  This unit shall bring together such equipment as may be necessary to operate the facility, and all interoffice and regular postal mail for the capitol area shall be handled by this unit.
(L. 1965 p. 141 § 7)
